diagrams.title: Command Line Arguments Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how argv array stores command line arguments in memory
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how arguments are stored contiguously in memory with NULL at end

diagrams.title: argc-argv Relationship Diagram
diagrams.description: Illustrates the relationship between argument count and argument vector
diagrams.purpose: Understand how argc value corresponds to argv array contents and indices

diagrams.title: Flowchart: Argument Validation Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step validation of command line arguments in a program
elements: Valid count? Yes→Parse arguments No→Print error
diagrams.purpose: Follow proper validation flow to prevent runtime errors

visuals.title: Command Line Arguments
visuals.description: Visual diagram for command line arguments
